series_metadata.series_description: Records generated or gathered by division field personnel during investigations of livestock care standards complaints.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep a minimum of 5 years unless in litigation with the division. In this case, keep for two years after any administrative, civil, or criminal action is complete then destroy. ; Electronic: Keep a minimum of 5 years unless in litigation with the division. In this case, keep for two years after any administrative, civil, or criminal action is complete then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
